title: Projects
content:
qProbConc


qProbConc is a Haskell interpreter for a concurrent, probabilistic, and quantum programming language.

The project is connected to my research on the semantics of programming languages combining concurrency with probabilistic and quantum effects.




  GitHub Playground


The GitHub playground contains small projects and exercises related to topics I am currently learning or exploring, including Python, quantum programming frameworks, and other programming experiments.
